repo_signals: L3 smoke for hardware.signal-processing: FFT/DFT, FIR/IIR filter design, fixed vs floating point, Nyquist sampling, windowing and spectral leakage, convolution
implement a REST API endpoint with request validation

retrieval_query: fft dft fir iir filter design nyquist sampling windowing spectral leakage convolution fixed point quantization

validation_smoke.name: hardware.signal-processing L3 validation smoke
signals: round-trip FFT then inverse FFT reconstructs the input within floating-point tolerance
designed filter magnitude response meets passband ripple and stopband attenuation spec
no aliased energy appears above the Nyquist frequency in the captured spectrum
fixed-point chain output matches the floating-point reference within the budgeted quantization error

diagnosis_smoke.name: hardware.signal-processing diagnosis smoke
signals: unexpected high-frequency tone indicates aliasing from an undersampled or missing anti-alias filter
smeared spectral peaks across many bins point to rectangular-window leakage
growing or oscillating IIR output signals a pole outside the unit circle
sudden sign flips in fixed-point output reveal accumulator overflow and wraparound
a DC offset in every bin suggests a missing fftshift or mishandled zero bin
